data.body:
Review (fresh context, no implementation history):

WHAT I REVIEWED
- Read .lattice/plans/task_01KTJQF0WGRSJ1HX68NE8DB15D.md (plan)
- Read .lattice/notes/audits/story-audit.md (audit doc, 525 lines)
- Read .lattice/notes/audit-gaps.md diff (one new Story palette entry)
- Read git diff master..HEAD (5 files; no src/, no DESIGN.md, no audit-prompt.md)

STRUCTURE / SCOPE
- Audit doc structure matches audit-prompt §10: Page metadata, Scope (in/out), House identity, Typography audit, Color audit, Forward observations, Gap appendix. PASS.
- All 5 in-scope files have at least one row: StoryPage.tsx (multi-row), OriginStory.tsx (wrapper+3 children), NeighborhoodCampusDiagram.tsx (multi-row), PhotoGallery.tsx (one JUSTIFY enumeration row), GalleryImage.tsx (bg-muted EXACT row). PASS.
- Out-of-scope list explicit: FractalPattern, Navbar/Footer/FadeIn/MandelbrotIcon, SectorHeader internals, Button component, storyPhotos data, PretextParagraph internals. Matches plan and FRAC-20/24 precedent. PASS.

FORMAT
- file:line opening-tag granularity applied consistently. PASS.
- Responsive elements list both mobile and desktop renderings (text-sm md:text-base, text-xl md:text-2xl, text-lg md:text-xl, text-[10px] md:text-xs, text-xs md:text-sm). PASS.
- Composite cascade documented (h3 global italic vs .text-subtitle override; .font-serif italic on center node). PASS.
- Color grouping by (file + token): the Story palette cluster is one consolidated row spanning both files. PASS.

CRITICAL CLASSIFICATIONS
- Story palette cluster (#D4BA58 + #8A7A20) classified GAP with one consolidated audit-gaps.md entry. Three proposed system changes (token pair / raw-hex carve-out / reuse house pair) recorded for human queue. PASS.
- FractalPattern call site (StoryPage.tsx:202) DOCUMENTED AS EXCLUDED with Action: EXCLUDED row. Matches FRAC-20/24 precedent. PASS.
- SectorHeader call site (StoryPage.tsx:209) classified GAP (NOT EXACT to a house-deep token like Lab/Campus). Correct — Story has no house pair. PASS.
- Both PretextParagraph sites (lines 179, 224) classified GAP with explicit "covered by Lab gap entry, no new entry" note. PASS — audit-gaps.md does NOT have a duplicate Pretext entry.
- text-foreground / text-foreground/90 classified EXACT under alpha-is-presentation rule. PASS.
- bg-background / border-border / ring-ring / bg-muted classified EXACT. PASS.
- TalkCard wrapper (StoryPage.tsx:122) flagged NEAR for missing paired text-foreground per FRAC-42. PASS.
- Cross-house leak check explicitly performed and documented as "no leaks found" with the 12 house hex values walked. PASS.
- Inversion check explicitly noted as N/A (Story is non-house). PASS.

FORWARD OBSERVATIONS (worth surfacing)
- Charcoal-on-Story-gold vs cream-on-saturated-house-bg divergence captured WITH contrast math (8.2:1 vs 1.2:1 — cream on gold would fail WCAG). Excellent reasoning; explains why the author's editorial choice is correct on this particular bg even though it diverges from the Lab/Campus convention.
- Body-paragraph size drift continues the Lab/Campus pattern (cross-page repetition now on 4+ pages). Strengthens future case for a container-scoped body utility.
- Center-node italic-Fraunces as logotype role recorded.
- Likely Protocol-page parallel to the non-house-accent question explicitly flagged — useful sitewide context for the human decision on the gap entry.
- PillarCard / CenterNode transparent-surface pattern (FRAC-42 implicit-pass) recorded.

GAP APPENDIX
- One new entry in audit-gaps.md, correctly appended after the Campus 2026-06-08 entry. Format matches audit-prompt §7. Date 2026-06-09 (Story is the only audit run on this date — no chronological conflict with prior entries).
- Pretext sites note: cross-reference to Lab entry, not duplicated. Clean.

NO src/ CHANGES, NO DESIGN.md CHANGES, NO audit-prompt.md CHANGES — confirmed via git diff master..HEAD.

BASELINE
- pnpm typecheck blocked by missing node_modules in this worktree. Documented in commit message. Audit-only work with no src/ changes — no possible regressions. Acceptable per the FRAC-24 precedent (audit-only tasks; baseline verification is a sanity check, not a gate).

VERDICT: PASS. Implementation matches the plan's acceptance criteria comprehensively. The audit doc is rigorous, the gap entry is well-framed (three options with a sitewide-Protocol-page note), and the forward observations include solid contrast-math justification for the charcoal-on-gold author choice. Ready for done.

No implementation-level rework needed. No plan-level rework needed.
